programmes.show_description: 60 minutes of hits and headlines from the year Gary Barlow, David Tennant and Clare Balding were born. And the UK said goodbye to pounds, shillings & pence as we went decimal!
60 minutes of hits and headlines from a year of major cultural debuts - Jesus Christ Superstar, Are You Being Served? and George, Zippy & Bungle in Rainbow!
All night - rewind to a time of big hair, outrageous makeup and platform shoes. The greatest gems of glam pop & rock, including Alvin Stardust, Abba, Slade & Wizzard.
60 minutes of hits and headlines from the year the UK entered Europe, Led Zeppelin conquered America, and Wimbledon Common said hello to The Wombles!
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1973!
From the era of glam rock, new wave and disco, it's all the hits from just one decade - the 1970s! Platform boots and flares at the ready?
Elton's big hits in order from 1971's "Your Song" to 1979's "Are You Ready For Love". Includes famous live performances and recent official video remakes of all-time classics.
If you don't get up and dance, you aren't human! Disco was the best floor show in town & once again it's time to get up & get lost in the pulse!
From the early days when soul gained that disco beat in 1973, to the turn of the decade when Blondie and Diana Ross got in on the act! Simon Bates is your dancefloor host!
If you don't get up and dance, you aren't human! Disco was the best floor show in town & once again it's time to get up & get lost in the pulse!
Switch on your CB radio, grab a bar of that chunky chocolate, and climb aboard for ninety minutes of top tunes for all you '70s truckers out there. Can I get a big 10-4, buddy?!
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1976!
A complete rundown of the 30 biggest selling UK singles UK for 1976 - can you believe these were all hits 50 years ago? And if you thought Abba were at number 1 - think again!

programmes.show_name: All Day- It's A MASSIVE 70s Party!
programmes.show_description: From hippies to punk rockers, via folk, funk, soul & disco - these are the classic songs that made the 70s!
Get ready for the weekend with our selection of songs guaranteed to get you in the mood! Yes there's some cheese in our 50, but there's also heaps of quality tuneage!
From hippies to punk rockers, via folk, funk, soul & disco - these are the classic songs that made the 70s!

programmes.show_name: Bruno Brookes UK Top 40 of the 70s
programmes.show_description: Including ten big million-sellers back when it was a rare achievement! These are 40 of the biggest-selling songs of the decade with Bay City Rollers, ABBA, Queen, Blondie and Wings.
From hippies to punk rockers, via folk, funk, soul & disco - these are the classic songs that made the 70s!
They say music goes in cycles - well for a period in the 70s we decided to celebrate all things 50s! Showaddywaddy's Dave Bartram has hits from Alvin Stardust, Mud, Darts & Grease!

programmes.show_name: I'm Stone In Love With You!
programmes.show_description: Crackling vinyl, shag carpets & lava lamp glows - this is how we loved in the 70s! Oh James...
These 25 stars of rock and pop during the '70s are no longer with us. But the music from names like McVie, Bowie, Bolan, Marley, Mercury, Lennon and Presley will live on forever.
David Hamilton with 30 famous songs, 3 from every year. Each was a million selling single or from a million-selling album, either in the UK or around the world!
Feelgood hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?

programmes.show_name: Me & You & A Dog Named Boo! Top 12
programmes.show_description: From a 'Horse With No Name' to a 'Dog Named Boo' - 12 songs about animals, or by artists with animal connections. Pretty contrived but quite good fun.

Tracks with big TV connections! Could be theme tunes, adverts or just a song made famous by a TV show.
Non-stop 70s rock & power ballads - all day!
A 10 hour pentathlon of power - a deafening decade of hits! 130 songs to turn up loud, presented by the only man who can - Bam!
